meta.title: pixel.team — Your AI agents deserve an office
meta.description: Watch your AI team build software in a virtual office. From idea to shipped product, with full visibility into every decision.

hero.subheadline: A pixel-art virtual office where 15 AI agents brainstorm, plan, and code your project — while you watch.
hero.screenshotAlt: The Office — pixel-art virtual office with AI agents working
hero.trustLine: Free & open source · Bring your own API keys

problem.label: THE PROBLEM
problem.headline: Great ideas shouldn't die in your notes app
problem.subheadline: There's a canyon between having a vision and shipping a product. Most people get stuck somewhere in between.

cards.title: I'm not technical
cards.description: You don't need to be. Describe your idea in plain English and let the AI team handle the rest.

cards.title: I'm building alone
cards.description: Solo founders get a full team: PM, architect, frontend, backend, QA, and DevOps.

cards.title: AI feels like a black box
cards.description: Watch every decision happen in real-time. See the reasoning, the code, the reviews.

cards.title: Sessions spiral into chaos
cards.description: Structured phases keep work focused: discover, plan, then build. No more prompt soup.

phases.label: HOW IT WORKS
phases.headline: From napkin sketch to working code
phases.subheadline: Three structured phases keep your project on track, from idea to implementation.

items.label: PHASE 1
items.name: Imagine
items.description: Your AI team explores the problem space, validates ideas, and creates a comprehensive design.
items.artifacts: Vision Brief · PRD · Market Analysis · System Design

items.label: PHASE 2
items.name: War Room
items.description: The team breaks down the design into an actionable plan with clear tasks and specifications.
items.artifacts: Implementation Plan · Task Breakdown · TDD Specs

items.label: PHASE 3
items.name: Build
items.description: Engineers execute the plan, writing code with tests and reviews at every step.

orgChart.label: YOUR TEAM
orgChart.headline: 15 agents. Three departments. One office.
orgChart.subheadline: A complete virtual team that collaborates, reviews, and ships — so you don't have to do it alone.

items.label: Live Visualization
items.title: Every tool call becomes a character action
items.description: Watch your AI agents move through the office in real-time as they write code, review PRs, and discuss architecture.

items.label: Project Management
items.title: Kanban, code review, and cost tracking
items.description: Built-in project dashboard with task boards, code diffs, and token usage tracking across all agents.

items.label: Artifacts
items.title: Every decision, documented
items.description: PRDs, system designs, implementation plans, and test specs are all saved as reviewable artifacts.

items.label: Works Locally
items.title: Your repo, your machine, your keys
items.description: Built-in git: every phase becomes a real commit on a real branch in your project. Powered by the Claude Agent SDK with your own API key — no servers, no telemetry, no lock-in.

workshop.headline: Need something quick? Use Workshop.
workshop.description: Not every idea needs a full production. Workshop mode lets you spin up a single-prompt build — perfect for prototypes, landing pages, or quick experiments. No team, no phases, just results.

mobile.label: MOBILE
mobile.headline: Your office, in your pocket.
mobile.description: Scan a QR code from the desktop app to pair your phone, watch builds stream in real-time, approve reviews, and nudge agents — all from the mobile companion.

finalCta.headline: Start building with your AI team.
finalCta.subheadline: Free. Open source. Bring your own API keys.
finalCta.trustLine: Works with Claude Code · macOS, Windows, Linux · Open Source · Free

download.headline: Get the app
download.subheadline: Free. Open source. Bring your own API keys.
download.intelMacFallback: On an Intel Mac? Download Intel build
download.betaWarning: Beta build — unsigned. macOS: right-click → Open. Windows: More info → Run anyway.
